creator: paterno@dsi.UNIFI.IT
text:
Scanning big colored images with SANE 1.00, kernel complains about

    cam_periph_mapmem: attempt to map 68712 bytes, which is greater than
    DFLTPHYS(65536)

Fix: Obtained from: Parag Patel <parag@cgt.com> on sane-devel mailing list.

Add the following patch to graphics/sane/patches:
How-To-Repeat: 
Simply scan a colored image bigger than 7x5 cm, or take a colored preview.
